question: Design a `Book` class with private members for `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (string types). Provide public methods to set and retrieve these details, and a method `displayBookDetails()` to print all information.

test_cases.input: Create Book1, set title 'The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy', author 'Douglas Adams', ISBN '978-0345391803'. Display details. Create Book2, set title '1984', author 'George Orwell', ISBN '978-0451524935'. Display details.
test_cases.expected:
--- Book 1 Details ---
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Author: Douglas Adams
ISBN: 978-0345391803

--- Book 2 Details ---
Title: 1984
Author: George Orwell
ISBN: 978-0451524935
